programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River
programme.desc: World-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. Steeped in the brotherhood of kayaking, Fisher, and his fellow paddlers, run head-on into some of the most radical rapids ever recorded

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep108: North Pole
programme.desc: The Travel Quest crew takes an icebreaker to the North Pole just in time to make a satellite phone call to wish Bill's mother a happy birthday (she is so shocked she doesn't recognize him). We also track and film the biggest predators on earth…polar bears.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: In-Depth Look at Brook Trout in West Virginia
programme.desc: We learn about Brook Trout with West Virginia DNR Fisheries Biologist, Brandon Keplinger, TU's Dustin Wichterman, and their children.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep305: Formula Foil World Championships
programme.desc: The Formula Foil World Championships from Saint Moritz, Switzerland.

programme.title: Blue World Ep507: Sand Tiger Sharks + Marine Biology in Turks Caicos
programme.desc: Blue World heads to North Carolina to observe how shipwrecks have become home to thousands of animals, including Sand Tiger sharks. But instead of chasing the fish, the sharks are protecting them! Then, we visit the School for Field Studies in the Turks Caicos Islands to learn how to tag sharks!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep104: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 4 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep110
programme.desc: Liquid Edge examines the subject of surf territorialism and the Aloha Spirit; the beauty and challenge of stand-up paddling in Tahiti; extreme whitewater kayaking. Included is an amazing look behind the scenes of the 3D movie adventure Storm Surfers, plus a spectacular kiteboarding sweet spot.

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 01
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 02
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 03
programme.desc: Some of the greatest pro snowboarders to ever do it, claim Josh Dirksen as their favorite rider to watch. His Microdose story continues, taking on new dimensions with perspectives from more of his MtBachelor Bend Oregon crew: Kevin Jones, Todd Richards, Trevor Graves, Embry Rucker and Robbie Morrow

programme.title: MICRODOSE Josh Dirksen - Dose 04
programme.desc:
Growing up snowboarding the natural wind features of Mt. Bachelor played a big part in shaping Josh Dirksen's unique and seemingly effortless riding style. He seamlessly transferred his surf and skateboard influenced smoothness to a new audience, when he started filming with Kingpin Productions.
Featuring: Gerry Lopez, Travis Yamada, Kevin Jones, Trevor Graves, Rob Morrow, Allister Schultz, Chad Otterstrom, "Whitey" Rob McConnaughey

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Down For This
programme.desc: Down For This is a rollercoaster of adrenaline and heartfelt emotion in a 1-hour-25-minute slide of 30 years past to present. Featuring some of the most memorable Volcom skating surfing and snowboarding.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 1
programme.desc: In Chapter One of Side Hits Euphoria, snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo showcase their favorite features to ride; random jumps and hits on the side of the piste. They spent their season capturing these little treasures hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 2
programme.desc: Chapter 2 of Side Hits Euphoria features resort riding, side hits, and random stuff on the slopes. In December 2018, the snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo filmed everything they found during their travels to Mount Seymour in Canada, and in Laax and Arêches-Beaufort in Switzerland.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 3
programme.desc: Side Hits Euphoria is back! Chapter 3 features resort riding, side bonking, groomer gliding, and pure shredding. Filmed by the snowboarders Olivier Gittler and Arthur Longo in December of 2019, in and around Tignes, Val d’Isère, Avoriaz and Chamonix, France. Thanks for watching!

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Valkenswaard

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Campus Life Experience, Laura gets on the site and checks everything is cleaned properly and in order. She teaches us how to disinfect wraps to protect horses from diseases. Then, we go for a walk with the horses and try different exercises to work on the horse-rider combination.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 3
programme.desc: Laura Conz starts this episode making sure all students have their helmets on to avoid any accidents before teaching them regarding horses health and how to take care of their legs. Then, both horse and rider will be receiving ultrasound massage to help their circulation flow properly before learning more health tips from their teachers.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo
programme.desc: Comedia romántica sobre un joven de la América profunda que -tras tener como improvisado maestro de guitarra a un emigrante- viaja a México huyendo de su vida tediosa y de su familia, para ejercitarse como mariachi.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
